title: oxytropis lagopus var. lagopus
intro: Oxytropis lagopus var. lagopus, also known as the Arctic milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high saponin content. The health benefits of Oxytropis lagopus var. lagopus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
